about-description: I am a Frontend Developer with experience in React, Vue.js, React Native, and Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP) for web and cross-platform projects. I actively work with AI tools (GitHub Copilot, Codex) integrated into my daily development workflow. I come from a non-linear path: I started in education, which gave me adaptability and solid communication and teamwork skills. Currently, I am deepening my knowledge of development best practices (Clean Code, SOLID) and expanding my education with a Bachelor's Degree in Computer Engineering. If you are looking for a developer who can seamlessly integrate programming and visually appealing design, together we can achieve great things!
whatido-subtitle: Here you can discover my passions and the things I like to do and those I am good at.
design: I like UX and UI design. I try to be constantly learning and searching for new tools to make my projects more attractive.
coding: I like to code and learn new programming things. I am constantly trying to innovate, and taking new courses to expand my knowledge and improve my professionalism.
skills: I have skills to socialize, adapt to new situations, and face new challenges. I like to work in a team, and I have experience in the Scrum methodology.
experience-description: In this section you can check out some of the technologies that I have worked with along these years.
contact-subtitle: Do not hesitate to contact me through this form and I will respond as soon as possible!
footer-text: Frontend developer in constant training, passionate about the field of technology and learning.
pages-description: Welcome to the web page projects section! Here, you'll discover a collection of my creations crafted with HTML, CSS, PHP, JavaScript, React, Bootstrap, and Chakra UI. If you are looking for a web developer, feel free to explore and get in touch with me for any inquiries.

pages-descriptions: Website for Joviat school administrators to upload student data. Made with React Native, Chakra UI, and Firebase.
Website made with the Pokémon API, React, and Chakra UI. It features list and grid views, navigation, and pagination.
Web page project made with React for the Meta 'Frontend Developer' course. This course provided a solid foundation in React best practices and API integration, among other things.
Web page project based on React and Chakra UI for the Meta 'Frontend Developer' course.
Group web project created for the Migracode bootcamp. The project simulates an NGO platform that connects beneficiary users, volunteers, and donors. Made with React, Bootstrap, Node.js, and SQL.
Group flight search task, built using PHP, HTML, CSS, XSL, and XML.
Web page project based on React, HTML, CSS, and Bootstrap.
Web page project based on XML, HTML, CSS, XSLT, and PHP for two stores: one modern and one vintage.
Application to load data into a database table in phpMyAdmin, built with HTML, CSS, Bootstrap, and PHP.
Application that allows exporting database tables in phpMyAdmin into XML format, built with HTML, CSS, Bootstrap, and PHP.
Goal website landing page clone made with HTML and Bootstrap 5.
Practice project to replicate the interface of the Airbnb.es website.
Responsive web page developed using the mobile-first design approach for a pastry shop.
Web page that retrieves news from RSS feeds, allowing users to choose to show headlines, photos, or both.
Web page built using HTML, CSS Grid, and Flexbox, as part of Juan Pablo de la Torre Valdez's course.
Responsive web page for a brand offering marketing and web design services, made with HTML, CSS, PHP, and JavaScript.
Web page built using HTML and CSS for the 'HTML and CSS in Depth' course by Meta.
My previous portfolio website to showcase my projects.

app-description: Welcome to the Applications section! Here, you'll find my apps, designed and developed to offer a seamless user experience. Feel free to explore and reach out to me for any inquiries or further information.

apps-descriptions: Social application made with React Native for Android and iOS mobile devices, developed for the Hospitality section of the Joviat school to connect the institutional community.
Mobile application to upload, rate, and save recipes, developed with Android Studio and Java.
Android application to control computer fan speed.
Android CRUD application to manage data, built with SQLite and Android Studio.

api-description: Welcome to the APIs section. Here you will find web pages that I have made, using APIs for the backend, some of them created by other developers, and some others implemented by myself.

apis-titles: JS Web Page using Rick and Morty API
Soulplates Web Page using React and Node.js
apis-descriptions: Web page that showcases details about the Rick and Morty TV show, powered by the Rick and Morty API.
Web page project made with React for the Meta 'Frontend Developer' course. This course provided a solid foundation in React best practices and API integration.
Group web project created for the Migracode bootcamp. The platform connects beneficiary users, volunteers, and donors. Built with React, Node.js, and SQL.
Website made with the Pokémon API, React, and Chakra UI, featuring list and grid views, navigation, and pagination.

game-description: Welcome to my digital corner of creativity and experimentation! Here you will find a selection of video game projects that I have embarked on with curiosity and dedication, though I do not aim to be a professional in the field. Each game is a window to new skills and discoveries. I invite you to explore them and share your impressions. Enjoy the journey through this playful and experimental terrain!

games-descriptions: Mobile game developed using Unity, Adobe Illustrator, and CorelDRAW.
Classic Flappy Bird game built in C# using Unity.
Game demo developed using Unity, Adobe Illustrator, and CorelDRAW.
Game demo developed using Unity, Adobe Illustrator, and CorelDRAW.
